experience.text1: Turn your journeys into an unforgettable experience with our specially designed luxury vehicle fleet. You are not just renting a car, we offer prestige and comfort together.
experience.text2: Each of our vehicles is in perfect condition and undergoes regular maintenance to meet the highest safety and performance standards.
experience.text3: We know how valuable your time is. With our professional team and chauffeured car rental options, we offer exclusive VIP service at any time of the day.

about.title: About Us
about.description: The story and activities of Amiral Group.
about.p1: Founded in 2014, Amiral Group started its operations to provide services in the luxury car rental sector with a high-quality, trust, and prestige approach. Since its foundation, it has become a strong and reliable brand in the sector by prioritizing customer satisfaction.
about.p2: In 2019, our company accelerated its growth process by opening its second branch in Etiler, Istanbul. In 2020, we launched our third branch in Bodrum, followed by our fourth branch in Vadi Istanbul. In line with our globalization vision, we have taken our place in the international arena with our branch opened in Dubai in 2025.
about.p3: Amiral Group continues its investments not only in the field of luxury car rental but also in different sectors. In 2020, a 32-unit villa project in Bodrum and a 14-unit villa project in Çeşme were successfully implemented. Since the same year, we have been active in the production sector with our textile dyeing and printing factory established in Tekirdağ.
about.p4: Today, Amiral Group continues its journey as a constantly growing and developing group of companies providing services in luxury car rental, construction, and textile fields.
about.footer: Amiral Group, the unchanging address of quality and trust
